comment.description: A brief description or note about the cache policy.

default_ttl.description: The default time-to-live (TTL) in seconds for objects in the cache.

etag.description: The unique identifier for the cache policy, used for versioning.

max_ttl.description: The maximum time-to-live (TTL) in seconds that objects can stay in the cache.

min_ttl.description: The minimum time-to-live (TTL) in seconds for objects in the cache.

parameters_in_cache_key_and_forwarded_to.description: Configuration for how cookies, headers, and query strings are included in the cache key and forwarded to the origin.
